description.en: A small, rare alligator endemic to eastern China, often called the 「Mud Dragon」.
description.zh: 一种产于中国东部的珍稀小型短吻鳄，常被人们称为「土龙」。

anatomy.en: It is much smaller than its American cousin, reaching about 1.5 to 2 meters. Its body is fully covered in tough, bony scales.
anatomy.zh: 它比美洲亲戚小得多，全长约 1.5 到 2 米。它的全身覆盖着坚硬的骨鳞。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They spend most of the winter hibernating in complex burrows dug into riverbanks. They eat fish, snails, and small animals.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们冬天大部分时间都在河岸挖掘的复杂洞穴中冬眠。它们以鱼、蜗牛和小动物为食。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are only found in the lower Yangtze River basin, living in slow-moving rivers, lakes, and ponds.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们仅分布在长江下游流域，生活在流速缓慢的河流、湖泊和池塘中。
